g.text: UniFi network: VLAN segmentation and firewall zones
Access-A egress order: allow TCP 80/443 → allow UDP 123 (NTP) → block remaining to External

The gateway routes tagged VLANs down the switch trunk; each zone keeps its own subnet and hosts. Ordered Access-A rules permit only web and NTP egress before the catch-all block, so a rule placed out of order drops HTTPS and NTP together.
